name: Edna's Cranberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients together except cranberry sauce and walnuts.
2. Butter a round tube baking pan.
3. Pour half of the batter into the pan.
4. Spread half of the cranberry sauce on top of the batter.
5. Pour the remaining batter over the cranberry sauce.
6. Sprinkle the chopped walnuts on top.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 35-40 minutes.
